context.current_marketing_model: Full-service agency retainer: brand strategy, creative production, and media buying as separate workstreams with monthly client syncs
context.target_audience: DTC founders doing $2M–$20M ARR in health, beauty, and home goods
approaches_to_converge: Brand storytelling and UGC creative loops
Performance marketing with ROAS-optimized media buying
Community-led growth via Discord and ambassador programs
goals: Unify three siloed workstreams into one agent-coordinated system
constraints: Team of 18 — no new hires this quarter
Clients expect weekly human touchpoints during transition
